headerDisplay: Clearlight/Jacuzzi infrared sauna controller. Saunas are auto-discovered on your local network. Run 'npm run sauna -- discover' to find your sauna's MAC address.

discoveryTimeout.title: Discovery Timeout (seconds)
discoveryTimeout.description: How long to listen for sauna responses during each network scan.

discoveryInterval.title: Discovery Interval (seconds)
discoveryInterval.description: How often to scan the network for saunas.

devices.title: Configured Saunas
devices.description: Optionally pin a sauna by MAC address and customise its HomeKit name and settings. Leave empty to auto-discover all saunas on the network.

name.title: Sauna Name
name.description: Display name shown in the Home app for this sauna.

mac.title: MAC Address (recommended)
mac.description: Hardware MAC address of the sauna's WiFi module. Run 'npm run sauna -- discover' to find it, or check your router's device list. Ensures the plugin always finds the sauna even if its IP address changes.

did.title: Device ID (alternative to MAC)
did.description: Gizwits device ID shown in the discover command output. Use this if MAC address is not available.

host.title: IP Address (deprecated)
host.description: Static IP address. Deprecated - use MAC address instead. Will break if the DHCP lease changes.

defaultTemp.title: Default Temperature (°C)
defaultTemp.description: Temperature shown in the Home app before the sauna reports its own set point.

minTemp.title: Minimum Temperature (°C)
minTemp.description: Lowest temperature the slider will go in the Home app.

maxTemp.title: Maximum Temperature (°C)
maxTemp.description: Highest temperature the slider will go in the Home app.

internalLightName.title: Internal Light Name
internalLightName.description: Name shown in the Home app for the internal cabin light switch.

externalLightName.title: External Light Name
externalLightName.description: Name shown in the Home app for the external light switch.

atTempSensor.title: At Temperature Sensor
atTempSensor.description: Add an occupancy sensor that triggers when the sauna reaches its target temperature. Enable notifications for this sensor in the Home app to get a native push notification when your sauna is ready.
